tagline: Search what Claude knows about you.
longDescription:
Produces purpose-built briefings on demand from your Encyclopedia — career summaries for job applications, person briefs before meetings, relationship context before family visits, period reviews, political profiles, topic syntheses. Six predefined templates plus a freeform mode, plus an optional Deep Search mode that mines text-message histories, journal entries, and misc documents for material the modular files might have missed.

Four detail levels (Full, Personal, Professional, Public) control privacy in the output — same encyclopedia, different surface depending on whether the briefing is for you, a coworker, or a public document. Trigger with "brief me on [person]", "deep search [topic]", "prep me for [situation]", "pull together everything about X". Outputs save to `~/.claude/encyclopedia/reports/` and are included in future Deep Search runs.
